purpose: To build a simple E-commerce web platform that allows customers to browse products, manage a cart, checkout with mock payment, place orders, and view order history.
roles: A user who browses products, manages a cart, and places orders.
A system administrator responsible for managing product sales and order processing.

stakeholders.description: Manages product sales and order processing.

business_rules: Customers can only order products that are in stock.
Checkout must calculate the total price before order placement.
Payment is mocked in the MVP.
constraints: The system must run locally during development.
The first version should focus on catalog, cart, checkout, and orders.
assumptions: Users access the system through a web browser.
Admin product management can be added after the MVP.

functional_requirements.title: Product Browsing
functional_requirements.description: The system should allow customers to browse products by category, search for specific products, and view product details.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system displays a list of available products when browsing by category.

functional_requirements.title: Product Details
functional_requirements.description: The system should provide detailed information about each product, including price, description, and images.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system displays the product name, price, and brief description.

functional_requirements.title: Cart Operations
functional_requirements.description: The system should allow customers to add and remove products from their cart, update quantities, and view the cart summary.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system allows users to add a product to their cart.

functional_requirements.title: Checkout
functional_requirements.description: The system should provide a checkout process that calculates the total price, applies discounts (if available), and confirms the order.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system calculates the total price based on the products in the cart.

functional_requirements.title: Order Placement
functional_requirements.description: The system should allow customers to place orders, including processing payment and sending order confirmation emails.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system sends a confirmation email to the customer after successful order placement.

functional_requirements.title: Order History
functional_requirements.description: The system should provide customers with access to their order history, including order status and details.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system displays the customer's order history.

functional_requirements.title: Product Search
functional_requirements.description: The system should allow customers to search products by product name, category, and price range.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system allows users to search for products by name.
The system allows users to search for products by category.
The system allows users to search for products within a price range.

use_cases.title: Customer Browsing
main_flow: The customer browses products by category or searches for specific products.
